title: The sabukaru Guide to Niche Alternative Manga
summary: At some point every manga reader runs into a wall where the big titles stop hitting the same and Google searches start chasing something else. Before long we’re deep in forum archives reading scans that were never even finished, and while they aren’t valuable in the usual sense, they stay with the reader because the connection feels personal in a way mainst…
content: The sabukaru Guide to Niche Alternative Manga
